Zhang Miao — different person (Gaoling, Cao Wei era), not the Chenliu governor.
Zhang Miao — different person (Jin dynasty), not the Chenliu governor.
cn=曹宏 — different Cao Hong (Tao Qian politician), not Cao Cao's general 曹洪.
Shentu Pan — DIFFERENT PERSON entirely. He shares the courtesy name "Zilong" with Zhao Yun, but the snippets refer to Zhao Yun (Zhao Zilong) joining Liu Bei.
cn=曹興 — different Cao Xing (Cao Wei politician), not Lu Bu's general 曹性.
cn=陳恭 — different Chen Gong (Han dynasty general from Jiangxia), not Lu Bu's advisor 陳宮.
cn=程郁 — different Cheng Yu (Liu Zhang faction), not Cao Cao's strategist 程昱.
cn=劉曜 — different Liu Yao (Cao Wei general), not the Imperial Protector of Yangzhou 劉繇.
cn=荀俁 — different Xun Yu, not the strategist 荀彧.
cn=荀禹 — different Xun Yu, not the strategist 荀彧.
cn=爰邵 — different Yuan Shao (Cao Wei general), not the warlord 袁紹.
Zhang Chao — different person (Hejian scholar), not Zhang Miao's brother (the Dongping one [3082] is the right Zhang Chao).
cn=張延 — different Zhang Yan (Han politician, died 186), not the Black Mountain bandit leader 張燕.
cn=張儼 — different Zhang Yan (Eastern Wu scholar), not 張燕.
cn=張琰 — different Zhang Yan (Gao Gan faction), not 張燕.
cn=張晏 — different Zhang Yan (Cao Wei scholar), not 張燕.
